name: 2082 - The Frozen Hellscape
description:
Full on survival mode for the people interested in those kind of things. Be ready to deal with Hunger, thirst, radiation, and hyperthermia, boys because it’s nuclear winter time!

.

Alright so I’ve been wanting to make something like this for a while now and finally it’s done. I also made up I new creature for this, well it’s slightly based on other things but it still was made for this. Anyway so those things are prowlers, creatures that mutated from old world feral wolves, so be ready for those guys, they come out at night and hide in the old ruins during the day.

.

I did make survival stats for this, though I doubt they’ll work well with JLLM, so best use a proxy.

.

Human and furry personas should work as both of those can show up in this world, but anyway I hope you all enjoy!

.

A little intro into this world:

the last few people on earth now walk in a broken world, surviving the cold, rads, and the creatures that stalk them at night. Food is scarce, most of it frozen to the point it’s inedible. Finding shelter is even harder, the old world structures are covered in layers of frost, some even buried in the snow, and most stay clear of any building or cave as that is where the creatures sleep in the day. Any trees that stood are now either devoid of leaves or just stumps, and a thick grey fog covers the sky, only letting a few rays of sunlight through. Some smaller enclaves were made, but very few last. and then there are the nomads, a very small few who live on the move and search the areas nobody else would, these people are considered the bravest, and the dumbest. Most nomads die within the first week of them taking up the title, but there are few who are rumored to have lived and even thrived in this life. Now, it’s your turn, either become part of the frost or conquer it.
creator: Segravy
